intro: Ammi visnaga, also known as khella, is a plant-based supplement commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The capsules are typically made from the seeds of the Ammi visnaga plant and are often used to alleviate symptoms of hypertension, anxiety, and stress. However, it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Ammi visnaga capsules, as their effects and potential interactions with medications can vary from person to person.
